title: CustomJoinAndLeaveMessages
description: Allows you to change the join and leave messages for your server!
body:
# Custom join and leave Messages!

To change the messages go to your server file/plugins/customjoinandleavemessages/config.yml

Default messages are:

[+] Player

[-] Player

# Reloading config:
To reload config do /reloadcjalm (cjalm = custom join and leave messages)

## WARNING:
This gets overiden by other plugins such as essentials!
